_comment: Species: Taichu Origin True Body (太初本源真身) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Taichu Origin True Body

canonical.appearance: Formless beast of origin-power 8 m, body radiates primordial light, eyes are origin-wells
canonical.size: 8 m manifestation, 0 jin (origin); true form spans origin-realms
canonical.behavior: Origin-incarnate being; cultivates by absorbing origin-essence; Wang Lin obtained as treasure
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained Taichu origin true body as treasure (canon event)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: Origin True Body core is beyond mortal alchemy; usable only by Origin-level cultivators
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: taichu_origin_beast — Origin True Body; its core contains primordial origin essence

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
